title: Microdon capitatus
taxonomy: Microdon capitatus is classified within the family Syrphidae, commonly known as the flower flies or hoverflies. This classification is based on its morphological and behavioral characteristics. Microdon capitatus belongs to the genus Microdon, which comprises approximately 70 species of flies worldwide. The species is further divided into several subgroups based on its physical characteristics and geographical distribution. As a member of the order Diptera, Microdon capitatus exhibits characteristics common to flies, such as two wings and a single pair of functional wings.
